notes: No new themes are proposed in this report.
The keyword JSON has not been modified.
Recommendations were retained only where the theme is a main topic of the post, not an incidental mention.
Promotional, announcement, personal, and broad reader-response posts remain unthemed unless a clear existing topical theme is central.
auditMethod: Each recommended article/theme link was checked against title, WordPress category, summary, and article text; broad or incidental tags were removed or replaced.
